kendra.datasource.CustomDocumentEnrichme.Docs: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

kendra.datasource.DataSourceConfiguratio.Docs: Configuration information for an Amazon Kendra data source. The contents of the configuration depend on the type of data source. You can only specify one type of data source in the configuration. Choose from one of the following data sources.  + Amazon S3+ Confluence+ Custom+ Database+ Microsoft OneDrive+ Microsoft SharePoint + Salesforce+ ServiceNowYou can't specify the `Configuration` parameter when the `Type` parameter is set to `CUSTOM`.  The `Configuration` parameter is required for all other data sources.

kendra.datasource.Description.Docs: A description of the data source.

kendra.datasource.IndexId.Docs: The identifier of the index that should be associated with this data source.

kendra.datasource.Name.Docs: The name of the data source.

kendra.datasource.RoleArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a role with permission to access the data source.  You can't specify the `RoleArn` parameter when the `Type` parameter is set to `CUSTOM`.  The `RoleArn` parameter is required for all other data sources.

kendra.datasource.Schedule.Docs: Sets the frequency that Amazon Kendra checks the documents in your data source and updates the index. If you don't set a schedule, Amazon Kendra doesn't periodically update the index.

kendra.datasource.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

kendra.datasource.Type.Docs: The type of the data source.
kendra.datasource.Type.Allowed values: CONFLUENCE | CUSTOM | DATABASE | FSX | GOOGLEDRIVE | ONEDRIVE | S3 | SALESFORCE | SERVICENOW | SHAREPOINT | SLACK | WEBCRAWLER | WORKDOCS
